Controls LED flashing, detects button presses, and executes interval blinking with completion messages.


## Files
- **[flash_leds.js](flash_leds.js.md)**: Controls LED flashing and button press detection on various hardware platforms.
- **[main.js](main.js.md)**: Executes a function to blink at intervals and prints a completion message.
